LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT AND CROSS DEFENDANT SUKIE LEE DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION, EQUITABLE INDEMNITY. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION, TORT OF ANOTHER. CROSS-COMPLAINANT TO PLEAD DUTY OWED BY LEE TO CROSS-COMPLAINANT AND BREACH. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT AND CROSS DEFENDANT SUKIE LEE DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer overruled as to first cause of action, equitable indemnity. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend as to second cause of action, tort of another. Cross-complainant to plead duty owed by Lee to cross-complainant and Breach. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
